# Vectora

Vectora is a crypto trust-monitoring site focused on token checks, saved watchlists, shareable reports, and scheduled trust snapshots.

## Public pages

- Home: https://getvectora.ai/
- Verification guide: https://getvectora.ai/verify-token.html
- Proof pack: https://getvectora.ai/proof.html
- Updates desk: https://getvectora.ai/updates.html
- Whitepaper: https://getvectora.ai/whitepaper.html
- Liquidity covenant: https://getvectora.ai/liquidity-covenant.html

## Product scope

- Multi-chain token trust checks across major retail chains
- Shareable token report pages
- Device watchlists with local history and diff views
- Scheduled monitored-token snapshots published on the updates desk

## Important constraints

- Vectora publishes data, not guarantees
- Watchlist pages are device-local and not intended as public landing pages
- Scheduled monitoring is shared-site monitoring, not personal alerting yet
